projectDescription: A browser-based automatic license plate recognition app that detects and reads vehicle plates in real time using your camera or uploaded images and videos — no server required.
keyFeatures: Real-time license plate detection via webcam
Upload images or videos for offline plate recognition
100% in-browser processing — no data leaves your device
Light, dark, and system theme modes
Sample images and videos for quick demos
Works on mobile and desktop browsers
publicApiSurface: Upload mode: image and video file processing
Plate list: view, edit, copy, clear detections
CSV export: download all detections with text, confidence, timestamp, ID
Settings panel: confidence threshold, confirmation time, continuous mode, skip duplicates, theme, language, audio/haptic feedback
Sample gallery: 10 demo images and 3 demo videos
